input.question: What percentage of grades are passing vs failing?

payload.question: What percentage of grades are passing vs failing?

output.sql:
WITH counts AS (
  SELECT
    CASE WHEN score >= 60 THEN 'Passing' ELSE 'Failing' END AS status,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM grades
  WHERE score IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY CASE WHEN score >= 60 THEN 'Passing' ELSE 'Failing' END
)
SELECT
  status AS status,
  cnt AS count,
  ROUND(100.0 * cnt / SUM(cnt) OVER (), 2) AS percent
FROM counts
ORDER BY percent DESC;

visualization.description: Distribution of passing vs failing grades
visualization.title: Percentage of Passing vs Failing Grades

payload.sql:
WITH counts AS (
  SELECT
    CASE WHEN score >= 60 THEN 'Passing' ELSE 'Failing' END AS status,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM grades
  WHERE score IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY CASE WHEN score >= 60 THEN 'Passing' ELSE 'Failing' END
)
SELECT
  status AS status,
  cnt AS count,
  ROUND(100.0 * cnt / SUM(cnt) OVER (), 2) AS percent
FROM counts
ORDER BY percent DESC;
